nodes.name: jsonb_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for JSONB_AGG and related JSON aggregation functions in batch mode.

nodes.name: min_max.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for MIN and MAX aggregate functions in batch mode.

nodes.name: ordered_set_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ordered-set aggregate functions such as percentile_cont and percentile_disc.

nodes.name: scalar_as_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for using scalar functions as aggregates in batch queries.

nodes.name: selective_count.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for selective (filtered) COUNT aggregate using FILTER clause.

nodes.name: selective_distinct_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for selective DISTINCT aggregates combining FILTER and DISTINCT clauses.

nodes.name: selective_general_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for general selective aggregates using FILTER clause with various aggregate functions.

nodes.name: sort_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for sort-based aggregation strategy in batch mode.

nodes.name: stddev_and_variance.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for standard deviation and variance aggregate functions in batch mode.

nodes.name: string_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for STRING_AGG aggregate function with various delimiters and ordering.

nodes.name: sum.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for SUM aggregate function with various numeric types and edge cases.

nodes.name: timestamp.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for timestamp aggregate operations including MIN/MAX over temporal types.

nodes.name: two_phase_agg.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for two-phase (partial/final) aggregation correctness in batch mode.

nodes.name: with_over_window.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test combining aggregate functions with over-window (OVER clause) functions in batch queries.

nodes.name: all_any_some.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ALL, ANY, and SOME subquery comparison operators in batch mode.

nodes.name: array_access.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for array element access and slicing operations in batch queries.

nodes.name: array.slt.part
nodes.summary: Comprehensive partial SLT test for array type operations, constructors, and functions in batch mode.

nodes.name: basic.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for basic SQL query operations in RisingWave batch mode.

nodes.name: bitwise.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for bitwise operators (AND, OR, XOR, shift) in batch queries.

nodes.name: boolean.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for boolean operations, comparisons, and type handling in batch mode.

nodes.name: case_when_optimization.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for CASE WHEN expression optimization and correctness in batch mode.

nodes.name: collation.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for collation and string ordering behavior in batch queries.

nodes.name: const.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for constant folding and literal expression evaluation in batch mode.

nodes.name: cte.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for Common Table Expressions (CTEs) in batch queries including recursive CTEs.

nodes.name: distinct.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for SELECT DISTINCT and DISTINCT ON clauses in batch mode.
